businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — three-pillar structure of Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), and Garena (gaming)
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Southeast Asian, Latin American, and global consumer internet company operating Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), and Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Friday close $86.00 (+0.99%). Attempting rebound near 52-week low ($77.05, 3/3). After Q4 earnings, YTD -32% plunge, but pursuing long-term growth through logistics + Brazil reinvestment strategy. Market cap $50.66B, P/E ~33.8x, Forward P/E ~21.86x.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): Southeast Asia's #1 marketplace — GMV fees, advertising, logistics (~64% of revenue)
Fintech (SeaMoney): SPayLater, SeaBank — lending, payments, insurance (~21% of revenue)
Gaming (Garena): Free Fire — global battle royale, in-game purchases (~15% of revenue)

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: PEG 1.26. Fair to undervalued vs growth rate

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Improving but temporarily pressured by reinvestment

growthDrivers.title: Shopee GMV +25% Guidance — E-Commerce Reinvestment Strategy
growthDrivers.description: TipRanks (3/8): 2026 Shopee GMV +25% YoY growth guidance. Targeting 2x fulfillment penetration. VIP program expanding to Brazil.

growthDrivers.title: Logistics + Brazil Reinvestment — 'Short-Term Pain, Long-Term Gain'
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/9): Expanding logistics/fulfillment network reinvestment. Competing with TikTok Shop and MercadoLibre. Market overreaction.

growthDrivers.title: Near 52-Week Low — Analysts Strong Buy $179.54 (+109%)
growthDrivers.description: StockAnalysis: 11 analysts Strong Buy. Average target $179.54, implying +109% upside from current price.

growthDrivers.title: RSI 31.25 — Entering Oversold Territory
growthDrivers.description: RSI has entered the 30s. Technically oversold condition. Short-term rebound possibility.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triangular ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee is the largest by GMV in Southeast Asia. Self-built logistics network.
700M Southeast Asian population, Latin American expansion. Young digital native market.

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: Southeast Asia e-commerce #2. Alibaba investment declining

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapid Southeast Asian penetration

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: Latin America e-commerce #1. Brazil market competition

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Q4 Earnings — Short-Term Pain for Long-Term Gain'
recentNews.significance: Revenue +36.4%, net income +255% but market disappointed by e-commerce reinvestment guidance. Long-term growth thesis intact.

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: Logistics + Brazil Reinvestment — Shares Trading Well Below Targets
recentNews.significance: Shopee logistics network strengthening + Brazil VIP expansion. TikTok Shop and MercadoLibre competition response.

recentNews.headline: TipRanks: Shopee GMV +25% Guidance, 2x Fulfillment Target
recentNews.significance: 2026 e-commerce growth acceleration intent. Short-term margin pressure but long-term TAM expansion.

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'Why Sea Limited Plunged Today' — -20% One-Day Drop After Q4
recentNews.significance: Despite earnings surprise, e-commerce investment expansion guidance didn't meet market expectations.

recentNews.headline: Charles Lim Capital Sells 57.7% of SE Stake — Institutional Exit Signal
recentNews.significance: Some institutional investors exiting. However, overall institutional ownership at 64.81% remains high.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 11 analysts Strong Buy consensus. Target $179.54 (+109%). Near 52-week low described as 'historic buying opportunity.' However, e-commerce reinvestment costs pressure short-term profitability.

risks.title: E-Commerce Reinvestment Pressuring Short-Term Profitability
risks.description: Shopee fulfillment + Brazil investment expansion limiting EBITDA growth. Market reacting negatively to 'growth vs profitability' dilemma.

risks.title: TikTok Shop and Temu Competition Intensifying
risks.description: Social commerce (TikTok Shop) + ultra-low-price (Temu) penetration in Southeast Asia threatening Shopee market share.

risks.title: Garena Revenue Growth Slowing
risks.description: Free Fire entering maturity phase. Gaming segment growth engine weakening.

risks.title: Share Dilution — YoY +5.54% Increase
risks.description: Stock-based compensation and convertible bonds diluting existing shareholder value.

buyReasons.title: Near 52-Week Low — Forward P/E 21.86x at Historic Low
buyReasons.rationale: YTD -32%, -57% from 52-week high. Forward P/E 22x for a +36% growth company is excessive discount.

buyReasons.title: Analysts Strong Buy — Target $179.54 (+109%)
buyReasons.rationale: 10 of 11 Buy. More than 2x upside projected from current price.

buyReasons.title: FCF $4.51B — Strong Cash Generation
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $7.24B. Ample capacity to fund reinvestment while maintaining growth.

buyReasons.title: RSI 31.25 Oversold — Technical Rebound Imminent
buyReasons.rationale: RSI entering oversold territory. High probability of short-term technical bounce.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited has plunged -32% since Q4 earnings, trading near its 52-week low ($77.05). Forward P/E 21.86x and PEG 1.26 represent a historic undervaluation for a +36% growth company.

The core issue is the 'e-commerce reinvestment vs profitability' dilemma. Shopee GMV +25% guidance and logistics investment are right long-term, but the market is reacting negatively to short-term margin pressure.

RSI 31.25 (oversold), 11 Strong Buy ratings (target $179.54, +109%), net cash $7.24B. Both technical and fundamental bottom signals. A potentially once-in-a-generation entry point for investors betting on Southeast Asian e-commerce + fintech growth.
